Name: Sakthi
Description: Sakthi is working at Cannyfore Company as a Software Engineer. He is deeply interested in AI tools and enjoys building intelligent applications using modern technologies. He has worked with LangChain, Google Gemini, OpenAI API, Hugging Face, and Pinecone to develop AI-powered systems. Sakthi is 26 years old and lives in Chennai, India. He specializes in backend development and AI integrations. In his free time, he loves playing chess to improve his strategic thinking and enjoys long bike rides during weekends.

Name: Abi
Description: Abi is a Machine Learning Developer who is passionate about artificial intelligence and automation. He has experience working with TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn, Keras, and LangGraph. Abi is 28 years old and currently lives in Bangalore, India. He enjoys building predictive models and experimenting with new AI frameworks. Outside of work, he likes playing chess tournaments online and going on adventurous bike trips with his friends.

Name: Prem
Description: Prem works as a Data Engineer with strong knowledge in vector databases and large language models. He has hands-on experience with FAISS, ChromaDB, Weaviate, Milvus, and Azure AI services. Prem is 30 years old and resides in Hyderabad, India. He focuses on building scalable data pipelines and AI retrieval systems. In his leisure time, he enjoys solving logical chess puzzles and relaxing with long-distance bike rides.

Name: Prashanth
Description: Prashanth is an AI Solutions Architect who designs enterprise-level AI systems. He has worked with Google Vertex AI, Amazon SageMaker, IBM Watson, Anthropic Claude, and Cohere. He is 32 years old and lives in Mumbai, India. Prashanth enjoys developing RAG pipelines and intelligent chatbot systems for businesses. Apart from his professional work, he spends his time playing chess, reading AI research papers, and exploring new places on his bike.

Name: Balaji
Description: Balaji is a Full Stack Developer with a growing interest in AI-driven applications. He has experience working with Streamlit, FastAPI, LangChain, Docker-based AI deployments, and Redis vector search. Balaji is 27 years old and lives in Coimbatore, India. He enjoys building interactive AI tools and experimenting with new technologies. During his free time, he plays competitive chess online and loves traveling on his bike to hill stations and nature spots.
